tasks.subject: Port Backend to TypeScript (v2.0 Architecture)
tasks.description:
Perform a systematic port of the Laravel PHP backend to a TypeScript-based architecture (likely NestJS or similar for high compatibility with Laravel patterns). 

1. Analyze existing Laravel structure (Models, Controllers, Services, Migrations).
2. Initialize a new TypeScript backend environment in `fwber-backend-ts/`.
3. Port core Models and Database Schemas to Prisma/TypeORM.
4. Port Business Logic (Services) to TypeScript.
5. Port API Routes and Controllers.
6. Implement Auth (JWT/Passport equivalent) and Middleware.
7. Verify API parity with the current frontend.
8. Plan the final swap/migration strategy.

tasks.subject: Finalize Backend Port & Prepare Frontend Integration
tasks.description: Finalize the TypeScript backend port by ensuring all services are fully integrated, documentation is updated, and a clear path for frontend integration is established. This includes a final audit of the ported services and providing a summary for the next agent.
tasks.activeForm: Finalizing backend port and preparing for frontend integration...

tasks.subject: Integrate Next.js Frontend with TS Backend
tasks.description: Integrate the Next.js frontend with the newly created TypeScript backend. This involves updating API endpoints, switching to socket.io-client, and ensuring data consistency across the stack.
